title: LRC - JUIT
content:
E-Resources | http://ieeexplore.ieee.org/ (for Computing & Electronics) The following e-resources can be accessed under this subscription: 
Journals = 216 Resources are available with 10 years back volumes. Accessible Titles User Help Guide | https://www.nature.com/ Nature is a weekly international journal publishing the finest peer-reviewed research in all fields of science and technology on the basis of its originality, importance, interdisciplinary interest, timeliness, accessibility, elegance and surprising conclusions. Nature also provides rapid, authoritative, insightful and arresting news and interpretation of topical and coming trends affecting science, scientists and the wider public. To access please click here User Help Guide | https://search.proquest.com/business/ (for all subjects) ABI Inform  Complete database is world’s leading business and management journals  database. It provides online access to over 5,200+ business and management  journals from around the world.  ABI/INFORM is the original  aggregated business journals database and has been described as 'one of the longest-lived and most prominent  online products that has shaped the information professionals world' by  Online Magazine. To access please click here ScienceDirect | https://www.sciencedirect.com/ (for all domian of Engineering, Computer Science, Material Science). Subscription to Elsevier (ScienceDirect) Engineering, Computer Science, Material Science subject collection.
